body: Red-team concern on current draft: AlertEventService catch helper does not guarantee primary persistence isolation because VlmDescriptionEnqueueService @Transactional(REQUIRED) joins createEvent/upload transaction; a repository/JPA failure can mark the shared tx rollback-only even when caught. Requirement says enqueue failures remain side-channel. Consider after-commit dispatch / isolated transaction boundary (mind uncommitted AlertEvent FK visibility) or otherwise prove with integration behavior, not only a mocked throw. Also ensure snapshot-upload enqueue is covered by same analysis.
